curation_notes: Patch modifies a single file (SecureWSConnector.java). Two functions are vulnerable: buildResponseDocumentBody creates a DocumentBuilderFactory without disabling external DTD/schema access, and getTransformer creates a TransformerFactory without disabling external DTD/stylesheet access. The fix sets XMLConstants.ACCESS_EXTERNAL_DTD, ACCESS_EXTERNAL_SCHEMA, and ACCESS_EXTERNAL_STYLESHEET to empty strings. No sibling files exist in the directory. Pre-assigned class xxe (CWE-611) is correct.
